description: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas is an American white supremacist and neo-Nazi prison and street gang founded in 1981 at the Eastham Unit in Texas. It is one of the largest and most violent neo-Nazi prison gangs in the United States, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, murder, extortion, robbery, theft, and identity theft. The gang operates primarily in Texas and throughout the federal prison system, with an estimated 3,500 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: concentrated primarily in Texas but also in the prisons of neighboring states, in particular New Mexico .
country_links.context: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas has members in prisons of neighboring states, including New Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas ( ABT ) is an American white supremacist and Neo-Nazi prison and street gang .
country_links.context: The Aryan Brotherhood of Texas is an American prison and street gang, based and operating primarily in Texas and neighboring states, with members in federal and state prisons.
